text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 29. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
